ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm (e.g., region, state) */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the farm in acres */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the farm */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the farm was established */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the farm */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the farm in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., loam, clay, sand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop (e.g., vegetable, grain) */,
  "growing_season" TEXT /* Typical growing season for the crop */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature" TEXT /* Optimal temperature range for the crop */,
  "optimal_precipitation" TEXT /* Optimal precipitation range for the crop */,
  "optimal_soil_pH" TEXT /* Optimal soil pH range for the crop */,
  "optimal_soil_moisture" TEXT /* Optimal soil moisture range for the crop */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Information about disease resistance of the crop */,
  "growth_cycle" TEXT /* Detailed growth cycle of the crop (e.g., days to maturity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_properties" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil entry */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm for this soil data */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil */,
  "nutrient_level" REAL /* Overall nutrient level in the soil */,
  "organic_matter" REAL /* Percentage of organic matter in the soil */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Soil texture (e.g., sandy, loamy, clayey) */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level of the soil */,
  "cEC" REAL /* Cation Exchange Capacity of the soil */,
  "drainage" TEXT /* Drainage quality of the soil (e.g., well-drained, poorly drained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_properties_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather entry */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm for this weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the growing season */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation levels during the growing season */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity levels during the growing season */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the growing season */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation during the growing season */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Average cloud cover during the growing season */,
  "extreme_weather_events" INTEGER /* Number of extreme weather events (e.g., storms, droughts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the yield entry */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being evaluated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the yield measurement */,
  "yield_amount" REAL /* Total yield amount in tons */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the yield (1-10 scale) */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used for harvesting (e.g., mechanical, manual) */,
  "post_harvest_loss" REAL /* Percentage of post-harvest loss */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the yield was stored */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Market price of the yield */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm where the yield was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yields_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizers" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilizer */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer (e.g., organic, synthetic) */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Application rate in kg/acre */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the fertilizer */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the fertilizer (e.g., N-P-K ratio) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the fertilizer */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., broadcast, banding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application entry */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm where the fertilizer was applied */,
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fertilizer used */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application */,
  "amount_applied" REAL /* Amount of fertilizer applied in kg */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., broadcast, banding) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_fertilizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("fertilizer_id") REFERENCES fertilizers ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
